englishDefinitions: Criticizes people directly when they do something wrong or dishonest.
Calls out everyone for their behavior or mistakes.
persianTranslation: همه را بابت کارهایشان بازخواست می‌کند
همه را بابت اشتباهاتشان صدا می‌زند
examples: She calls everybody on their stuff when they try to make excuses.
In class, the teacher calls everybody on their stuff if they are being lazy.
He calls everybody on their stuff, so no one dares to lie to him.
